headline: NXP Semiconductors NV (NASDAQ:NXPI) Passes Quality Screen, Boasting 43% ROIC and 98% Profit Quality
summary: NXP Semiconductors passes the "Caviar Cruise" quality screen, showing strong revenue growth, impressive 43% ROIC, near-perfect cash conversion, and reasonable valuation for long-term investors.
